author: codex
scope: Reduced relation payload assertion_status=unknown with narrow delivered-status inference for source publication subject relations.

constraints.mutation_path: deterministic assertion qualifier/test changes plus bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize

subagents.finding_summary: Rebaselined 360 unknown funding_award relations. Found only one very small 3-record awarded_to slice, but the decisive award wording is in raw source block text rather than canonical relation description/source_quote fields for those records, so this turn held the slice instead of hardcoding record ids into assertion qualifiers.

rules.name: source_subject_publication_relations
rules.guard: relation_family publication_role; relation_kind about, about_entity, or covers; subject is source; object is entity; relation source_id/source_ids includes the source endpoint source_id
negative_guards: wrong endpoint kinds such as source->claim
provenance mismatch between relation source and source endpoint

held.name: funding_award_awarded_to_text_slice
held.reason: The scout found 3 high-confidence award records, but live canonical relation records lack the decisive source_quote/description text. The proof is present in raw source block text such as OAS/UDI/WAYE was awarded a contract. The pure assertion qualifier fold should not hardcode record ids, and broader description-only awarded_to rules would incorrectly catch approval-request records such as relation_exp-urbahn-contract-design-services.

held.name: timeline_agenda_relations
held.reason: Local sampling showed agenda relations mix no-items/no-meetings, planned work-plan agenda entries, and actual meetings, so they need a separate exact guard pass.

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts: 31 pass, 0 fail, 111 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: Relation assertion_status unknown remains 9185, dominated by metric_context 5661, agency_role 636, timeline_context 603, claim_context 509, partnership_engagement 361, funding_award 360, and corridor_scope 308.

Funding_award needs either source-block text available to assertion qualifiers or a separate deterministic materializer context pass before the 3-record awarded_to slice can be encoded without hardcoded ids.
Timeline agenda/no-items and corridor proposed/current operation surfaces remain promising but require exact negative guards.
